comparison_cohort_rule: same observation language or national political space
important_limitations: Inclusion is not an allegation of disinformation, extremism, automation or foreign coordination.
Narrative overlap is stored separately from evidence of coordination.
The 10-post/week and top-15-percent rules require a first 28-day observation window.
Official party, government, state-media and manually selected core sources remain eligible regardless of activity.
RT/RT DE and other sanctioned-source public exports are metadata-and-analysis only.

verification_statuses.official_primary: Listed by the organisation/person on an official primary site.
verification_statuses.official_or_primary_crosslink: Platform endpoint is cross-linked from an official profile or primary biography.
verification_statuses.official_platform: Account identifies itself as official and matches the official organisation.
verification_statuses.research_dataset_or_primary_crosslink: Supported by GESIS or another documented research dataset and/or an official crosslink.
verification_statuses.official_platform_or_crosslink: Supported by the account itself and another linked official endpoint.
verification_statuses.research_attributed: Operation or source family attributed by a named research or government source.
verification_statuses.pending: Not enabled until a current official crosslink is found.
